Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Total time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION across all rejected cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Minimum time it takes for Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION to occur after Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION to be executed in variants that include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER later in the process
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time between Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION and the subsequent re-submission (Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE) in looping variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION to final Payment Handled in cases that eventually succeed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Comparison of average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION versus time to Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time between Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in variants where both rejections occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in successful rework paths
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average duration of the entire process segment starting at Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION and ending at Payment Handled, compared to segments starting at Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total time elapsed between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION in variants that later lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION to be followed by a new Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE, specifically in cases that eventually encounter Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time from Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION to Request Payment in successful re-submission trajectories
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average cycle time of Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION when occurring in variants with multiple rejections versus single-rejection variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case
